name: Luke Bradford || Stranger
description:
And if you close your eyes

Does it almost feel like you've been here before?

Why is this stranger claiming to be your fiancé when you're married?

It's a beautiful day in the english countryside-

Nothing out of the ordinary.

That is, until this strange man breaks into the house, claiming he's your fiancé.

But thats preposterous!

You'd remember if you had a fiancé!

Or well, you would if you hadn't lost the last five years of your memories to a tragic accident.

You can't remember anything from that time...

You can't even remember your own wedding or how your husband Reeve proposed...

Or even how you both met.

Everything is fuzzy and you develop sharp headaches any time you try to remember.

Reeve tells you not to worry about the past because he is your future.

And you trust him.

Because why would your husband lie to you?

So this stranger must be mistaken!

But- why does he look so familiar?

This bot has themes of kidnapping, Drugging, Mental Manipulation, Non-Con due to user's memories being tampered with via drugs. While Luke is not your kidnapper, these themes are still present and central to the plot.

This is a companion to an older bot of mine; Reeve Radcliffe. Reeve is a bot I made when I was first beginning to make my own OCs and was quite ambitious for a time without scripts/lorebooks. I think he still holds his own charm even with the advancements!

So, if you enjoy Luke you might enjoy one of Reeve's two bots!

Reeve's OG
Reeve's Alt


That being said. PLEASE READ THE BACKGROUND INFO! This is plot is heavy and has a lot of backstory you need to know before beginning.

This is a commission for Mochi!
They wanted to see Luke brought to life for the first time
as they're a big fan of Reeve, the scoundrel he is.
Thank you for your commission Mochi!
And your patience while I brought him to life.

☆ You have been kidnapped by Reeve Radcliffe for over a year now.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
